top_signals.title: U.S. trade official says 'very few' Nvidia H200 AI chips have been shipped to China
top_signals.summary: The remark is a sign that H200 shipments to China have restarted, potentially boosting Nvidia's sales even higher.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Social Security cost-of-living adjustment estimate for 2027 falls as inflation cools
top_signals.summary: New estimates show Social Security's annual cost-of-living adjustment for 2027 may be between 3.7% and 3.8%. Here's what to know.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Hackers steal Lidl customer data from external service provider
top_signals.summary: The retailer said the incident did not affect its online shopping platform itself but involved a separately stored customer database maintained by a third-party provider. According to notifications sent to Lidl's German, Belgian and Dutch customers on Friday, the attackers briefly accessed the file and exfiltrated part of its contents.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Mizuho downgrades Circle to underperform, cuts price target to $50 on Open USD threat
Trump Backs Off 20% Fee Idea for Hormuz
